2606.17830.title: Functional Equivalence in Attention: A Comprehensive Study with Applications to Linear Mode Connectivity
2606.17830.paper_summary: Neural network parameter spaces are inherently non-injective, as distinct parameter configurations can realize identical functions through functional equivalence. While this symmetry is well understood in classical fully connected and convolutional models, it becomes substantially more intricate in modern attention-based architectures. Existing analyses of multihead attention have largely focused on the vanilla formulation, overlooking positional encodings that fundamentally reshape architectural symmetries. In this work, we provide a formal study of functional equivalence in Transformers with positional encodings. Focusing on the two most widely used variants--sinusoidal and rotary positional encodings (RoPE)--we show that sinusoidal encodings preserve the equivalence structure of vanilla attention, whereas rotary encodings significantly reduce the symmetry group, thereby enhancing expressivity. This offers a principled explanation for the growing prominence of RoPE in practice. We further examine how positional encodings affect linear mode connectivity, and through an alignment algorithm, empirically demonstrate that the presence and variability of connectivity across Transformer settings crucially depend on the positional encoding.
2606.17830.paper_summary_zh: 神經網絡的參數空間本質上是非單射的，因為不同的參數配置可以通過功能等價實現相同的函數。雖然這種對稱性在經典的全連接和卷積模型中得到了很好的理解，但在現代基於注意力的架構中變得更加複雜。現有的多頭注意力分析主要集中在基本的公式上，忽略了根本上重塑架構對稱性的位置信息編碼。在本研究中，我們對帶有位置信息編碼的Transformer中的功能等價進行了正式研究。專注於兩種最廣泛使用的變體——正弦和旋轉位置信息編碼（RoPE）——我們展示了正弦編碼保留了基本注意力的等價結構，而旋轉編碼則顯著減少了對稱群，從而增強了表達能力。這為RoPE在實踐中日益突出的現象提供了原則性的解釋。我們進一步檢查了位置信息編碼如何影響線性模式連通性，並通過對齊算法實證證明，Transformer設置中連通性的存在和變異性在很大程度上依賴於位置信息編碼。
2606.17830.author: Viet-Hoang Tran et.al.
2606.17830.authors: Viet-Hoang Tran, Vinh Khanh Bui, Van-Hoan Trinh, Tan Lai Ngoc, Tan M. Nguyen
